'''chatozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vyomanaut|vyomanaut]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vyomanaut|vyomanaut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chatozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chætezeth|chætezeth]] || [[word:chætezej|chætezej]] || [[word:chætezesh|chætezesh]] || [[word:chæteze|chæteze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chatotozoth|chatotozoth]] || [[word:chatotozoj|chatotozoj]] || [[word:chatotozosh|chatotozosh]] || [[word:chatotozo|chatotozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chatozoth|chatozoth]] || [[word:chatozoj|chatozoj]] || [[word:chatozosh|chatozosh]] || [[word:chatozo|chatozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chatofzoth|chatofzoth]] || [[word:chatofzoj|chatofzoj]] || [[word:chatofzosh|chatofzosh]] || [[word:chatofzof|chatofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chatozotho|chatozotho]] || [[word:chatozojo|chatozojo]] || [[word:chatozosho|chatozosho]] || [[word:chatozoko|chatozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chatozoth|chatozoth]] || [[word:chatozoj|chatozoj]] || [[word:chatozosh|chatozosh]] || [[word:chatozo|chatozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chatozothol|chatozothol]] || [[word:chatozojol|chatozojol]] || [[word:chatozoshol|chatozoshol]] || [[word:chatozokol|chatozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chatozothotho|chatozothotho]] || [[word:chatozojojo|chatozojojo]] || [[word:chatozoshosho|chatozoshosho]] || [[word:chatozoko|chatozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chatozothon|chatozothon]] || [[word:chatozojon|chatozojon]] || [[word:chatozoshon|chatozoshon]] || [[word:chatozokon|chatozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chatozothoro|chatozothoro]] || [[word:chatozojoro|chatozojoro]] || [[word:chatozoshoro|chatozoshoro]] || [[word:chatozokoro|chatozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
